nasb.text: Has this house, which is called by My name, become a den of robbers in your sight? Behold, I, even I, have seen it,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Has this house, which is called by my name, become a den of robbers in your eyes? Behold, I myself have seen it, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 這稱為我名下的殿，難道在你們眼中看為賊窩嗎？但我都看見了。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 难道这用来敬拜我的殿在你们眼中竟成了贼窝？这些事，我都看在眼里。这是耶和华说的。
